items.name: gitSurfStudio
items.description: GitSurf Studio is a blazing-fast, lightweight AI-powered IDE built on an autonomous PRAR (Perceive, Reason, Act, Reflect) engine.  While traditional IDEs bloat your system with hundreds of megabytes of extensions and background processes, GitSurf Studio separates the heavy lifting from the interface.
